manifest_scope: git tracked plus untracked/non-ignored regular files, SHA-256 and size, bundle directory excluded
untracked_source_archive: untracked_source/ contains untracked Python source and tests; non-source result/media files are hash-identified but not copied
snapshot_note: Post-run final report-time source snapshot. Final quality payloads independently record unchanged pre/post runtime-source identity; performance payloads record only committed HEAD.
